bootstrap_scope: Completed Bootstrap Commit 4 and Tasks 4–7 history plus Task 8 core cases, receipts, and digest-drift detection
bootstrap_status: Bootstrap Commit 4 is complete, including runtime MCP integration, evals, CI, deny.toml, and the final bootstrap report in 479700012a7b20dbcfead01b1af0ec25ffa06308. Tasks 4 through 7 are complete. Task 8 adds only core case/receipt/digest behavior with exact ring and uuid dependencies; it does not modify server/MCP handlers or add domain tools.
